w:r.w:t: AXOSOUL
TERMS AND CONDITIONS
www.axosoul.in | hello@axosoul.in | +91 8610381533
Effective Date: March 2025 | Last Updated: March 2026
1. Introduction and Acceptance of Terms

Welcome to AxoSoul ("Company", "we", "our", or "us"). These Terms and Conditions ("Terms", "Agreement") constitute a legally binding agreement between you ("Client", "User", or "you") and AxoSoul, a digital product development agency headquartered in Tenkasi, Tamil Nadu, India, operating globally.

By accessing our website at www.axosoul.in (or its staging/preview URL), requesting a quote, entering into a project agreement, making any payment, using any of our services, or otherwise engaging with AxoSoul in any capacity, you unconditionally agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree with any part of these Terms, you must immediately cease using our website and services.

These Terms apply to all services offered by AxoSoul, including but not limited to: Website Development, Mobile Application Development (Android, iOS, and Cross-Platform), UI/UX Design, Custom Software Development (including CRM systems), AI Integration services, Digital Marketing, SEO, and Performance Marketing services. These Terms are supplemented by any project-specific Statement of Work ("SOW"), proposal, or contract entered into between the parties, which shall take precedence over these Terms in case of direct conflict.
2. Definitions
For the purposes of these Terms and Conditions, the following definitions shall apply:
"AxoSoul", "Company", "we", "our", or "us" refers to the digital product development agency operating under the brand name AxoSoul, based in Tenkasi, Tamil Nadu, India.
"Client" or "you" refers to any individual, company, organization, or legal entity that engages AxoSoul for services, accesses the website, or submits a project inquiry.

"Services" refers to all services provided by AxoSoul, including web development, mobile app development, software development, UI/UX design, digital marketing, AI integration, and all related technical or creative services.
"Project" refers to a specific, agreed-upon scope of work described in a Statement of Work, proposal, or project brief, for which the Client has engaged AxoSoul.

"Deliverables" refers to all tangible outputs produced by AxoSoul in the course of completing a Project, including but not limited to source code, design files, documentation, and deployed applications.
"Statement of Work" or "SOW" refers to any written document that describes the specific scope, timeline, payment schedule, and deliverables for a given Project.
"Intellectual Property" refers to all patents, copyrights, trademarks, trade secrets, design rights, source code, databases, software, artwork, and all other proprietary rights.
"Maintenance Period" refers to the 6-month complimentary technical support period commencing from the date of Project delivery and launch.
"Milestone" refers to a defined stage in the project lifecycle upon the completion of which a corresponding payment may be due and/or a specific set of Deliverables is provided for Client review.
"Portfolio" refers to AxoSoul's showcase of past and demo projects displayed on its website for the purpose of illustrating capabilities.
3. Services Offered
3.1 Website Development

AxoSoul provides end-to-end website development services including custom web application development using React, Next.js, and other modern frameworks; e-commerce platform development; headless CMS implementation; performance-optimized static and dynamic websites; corporate and business websites; landing pages; and full-stack web solutions using Node.js, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Firebase, Supabase, and AWS. All websites are built from scratch tailored to the client's specific business requirements — no pre-made templates are ever used.
3.2 Mobile Application Development

AxoSoul develops native and cross-platform mobile applications including iOS applications using Swift; Android applications using Kotlin; and cross-platform applications using Flutter. Mobile development engagements include UI/UX design, backend API development, App Store and Google Play Store deployment support, and post-launch maintenance.
3.3 UI/UX Design

AxoSoul offers UI/UX design services including user research and persona development, wireframing and prototyping, full design systems, and visual design using Figma. Design services may be engaged independently or as part of a broader development project.
3.4 Custom Software Development

AxoSoul develops bespoke software solutions tailored to complex business needs, including Customer Relationship Management (CRM) systems, internal business tools and dashboards, enterprise workflow automation software, and other high-end custom software as specified in individual project SOWs.
3.5 AI Integration and AI-Powered Digital Marketing

AxoSoul offers artificial intelligence integration services including AI-powered feature development embedded into web and mobile products, machine learning workflow integration, API integration with third-party AI platforms, and AI-augmented digital marketing services. Digital marketing services include technical SEO, performance marketing and paid advertising, conversion rate optimization, and analytics and reporting.
3.6 Portfolio and Demo Projects

The portfolio section of AxoSoul's website displays demo projects and past client work for the purpose of illustrating technical capabilities and design quality. Demo projects are clearly labelled as such and are intended solely to demonstrate our capabilities. These demo projects do not represent production deployments for actual third parties unless explicitly stated. AxoSoul does not use pre-made templates; every client project is custom-built from scratch. AxoSoul reserves the right to showcase client work in its portfolio unless the Client explicitly requests confidentiality in writing prior to project commencement.
3.7 Free Quote and Consultation

Clients may request a free consultation and project quote through the AxoSoul website contact form, WhatsApp (+91 8610381533), or email (hello@axosoul.in). Submission of a quote request does not create a binding agreement or obligate either party to proceed. A project commences only upon execution of a formal SOW and receipt of the agreed initial milestone payment.
4. Project Engagement Process
All projects follow a structured engagement process:
Step 1 — Inquiry: Client submits a project inquiry via the website, WhatsApp, or email, providing details about their requirements.
Step 2 — Discovery Call: AxoSoul conducts a discovery consultation to understand the scope, goals, and technical requirements.
Step 3 — Proposal and SOW: AxoSoul prepares and presents a written project proposal including scope, timeline, technology stack, and milestone-based payment schedule.
Step 4 — Agreement and Commencement: Client reviews, approves, and signs the SOW. The project commences upon receipt of the initial milestone payment.

Step 5 — Development and Milestones: AxoSoul develops the product in defined milestones, with daily progress updates provided via the agreed communication channel (Slack or WhatsApp). Client reviews and approves each milestone.

Step 6 — Delivery: Final deliverables, including full source code via Git repository, documentation, deployment scripts, and environment configurations, are delivered to the Client upon final payment.
Step 7 — Maintenance Period: A 6-month complimentary maintenance period commences from the date of delivery.
5. Payment Terms and Policies
5.1 Milestone-Based Payment Structure

AxoSoul operates exclusively on a milestone-based payment structure. No full upfront payment is required. Payments are triggered by the achievement and Client approval of predefined project milestones as set out in the SOW. The specific milestones and corresponding payment amounts are agreed upon in writing prior to project commencement.
5.2 Pricing and Currency

All project pricing is quoted in Indian Rupees (INR) for domestic clients and may be quoted in USD, EUR, or GBP for international clients. Prices quoted in a proposal are valid for 30 days from the date of the proposal. Starting prices for services are indicated on the website (e.g., starting from ₹4,000) and are for indicative purposes only — final pricing is determined by project scope. All quoted prices are inclusive of any applicable taxes unless otherwise specified.
5.3 Payment Methods

Accepted payment methods include bank transfer (NEFT/RTGS/IMPS for INR transactions), UPI (for domestic INR transactions), international wire transfer, and other payment methods as agreed in the SOW. Specific payment details will be provided in the invoice issued at each milestone.
5.4 Late Payments

Invoices are due within 7 business days of issuance unless otherwise specified in the SOW. AxoSoul reserves the right to suspend active development work, withhold delivery of Deliverables, or terminate the project if payment is not received within 14 days of the invoice due date. A late payment notice will be issued before any suspension of work. Interest may be charged on overdue amounts at a rate of 1.5% per month from the original due date.
5.5 Scope Changes and Additional Costs

Any additions to the agreed project scope — including new features, functionality changes, design revisions beyond the agreed revision rounds, or technology changes — will be quoted and billed separately as a Change Order. No additional work will commence without written Client approval of the Change Order. The original quoted price is binding only for the originally agreed scope.
5.6 Refund Policy

Due to the nature of digital services involving significant time, intellectual effort, and resource allocation, AxoSoul's refund policy is as follows: Milestone payments for approved and delivered work are non-refundable; payments for in-progress milestones may be partially refunded at AxoSoul's discretion based on work completed; no refund is available for completed projects where Deliverables have been accepted by the Client. Refund requests must be submitted in writing to hello@axosoul.in within 7 days of the triggering event. Refund disputes will be handled in accordance with the Dispute Resolution provisions of these Terms.
6. Intellectual Property and Code Ownership
6.1 Client Ownership Upon Full Payment

Upon receipt of all payments due for a completed project, AxoSoul assigns to the Client full and complete ownership of all custom Deliverables created specifically for that project. This includes all source code, design files, database schemas, documentation, deployment scripts, and environment configurations. Delivery is made via a full Git repository handover.
6.2 Third-Party and Open-Source Components

Projects may incorporate open-source libraries, frameworks, APIs, and third-party components (e.g., React, Next.js, Flutter, Firebase SDKs, Supabase, AWS services). These components are subject to their own respective open-source or commercial licenses. AxoSoul will disclose all major third-party dependencies used in a project. The Client is responsible for ensuring continued compliance with applicable third-party licenses after project delivery.
6.3 AxoSoul's Pre-Existing IP

AxoSoul retains ownership of all pre-existing intellectual property, including proprietary tools, internal libraries, boilerplate code, development methodologies, internal processes, and all IP not specifically developed for the Client's project. No license to AxoSoul's pre-existing IP is transferred to the Client unless explicitly agreed in writing.
6.4 Portfolio Rights

Unless the Client requests confidentiality in writing before project commencement, AxoSoul reserves the right to showcase the completed project in its portfolio, including on its website, in pitch decks, in social media posts, and in other marketing materials. AxoSoul will not disclose confidential business information in any such showcase.
6.5 No Platform Dependency

AxoSoul is committed to delivering Deliverables free from artificial platform dependencies or code rental arrangements. Once fully paid, Clients can deploy, modify, or transfer their project to any third party without restriction.
7. Confidentiality and Non-Disclosure

Both parties agree to keep confidential any proprietary or sensitive information shared during the course of the project engagement. This includes business plans, technical specifications, financial information, trade secrets, and any other information designated as confidential. AxoSoul will not disclose client information to third parties without written consent, except as required to fulfil the project (e.g., sharing design files with a freelance specialist under a confidentiality obligation). This confidentiality obligation survives the termination of the project engagement for a period of three (3) years.
8. Client Responsibilities and Obligations
The Client agrees to:
Provide timely, accurate, and complete information, content, assets, brand materials, and credentials necessary for AxoSoul to perform the Services as and when requested.
Designate a single point of contact with authority to approve decisions, provide feedback, and sign off on milestones to prevent project delays.
Review Deliverables and provide written feedback or approval within 5 business days of delivery. Failure to respond within this window shall be deemed as approval.
Ensure that all content, images, trademarks, or other materials provided to AxoSoul for incorporation into the project do not infringe upon the intellectual property rights of any third party.
Make all milestone payments in accordance with the payment schedule set out in the SOW.
Provide access to necessary platforms, servers, APIs, accounts, and credentials (e.g., App Store developer accounts, domain registrars, hosting accounts) in a timely manner.
Notify AxoSoul promptly of any changes in project requirements, business direction, or scope.
Not use the Deliverables for any unlawful, unethical, or harmful purpose.
9. AxoSoul's Warranties and Representations
AxoSoul warrants and represents that:
All Services will be performed with reasonable skill, care, and diligence, in a professional and workmanlike manner.
Deliverables will materially conform to the specifications agreed in the SOW.
AxoSoul has the right to provide the Services and assign the Deliverables to the Client as described in these Terms.
AxoSoul will comply with all applicable laws and regulations in performing the Services.

AxoSoul carries a response time commitment of fewer than 4 hours during business hours (Mon–Sat, 9AM–8PM IST) for active project clients, and fewer than 30 minutes for critical production issues during the maintenance period.

These warranties do not cover issues arising from Client-made modifications to Deliverables after delivery, incompatible third-party software or API changes, Client-provided content or code, or misuse of the Deliverables.
10. Disclaimer of Warranties

EXCEPT AS EXPRESSLY SET OUT IN SECTION 9 ABOVE, AXOSOUL PROVIDES ALL SERVICES AND DELIVERABLES ON AN "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" BASIS WITHOUT ANY WARRANTY OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED. TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW, AXOSOUL DISCLAIMS ALL IMPLIED WARRANTIES, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, NON-INFRINGEMENT, AND ACCURACY.

AxoSoul does not warrant that any digital product delivered will be entirely error-free, uninterrupted, or free of security vulnerabilities at all times in all environments. Technology environments change, and third-party platforms, APIs, and operating systems may introduce breaking changes beyond AxoSoul's control.
11. Limitation of Liability
To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law:

AxoSoul's total aggregate liability to the Client arising out of or in connection with these Terms, a project SOW, or the Services shall not exceed the total amount actually paid by the Client to AxoSoul for the specific project giving rise to the claim.

In no event shall AxoSoul be liable for any indirect, incidental, consequential, special, exemplary, or punitive damages, including but not limited to loss of profits, loss of revenue, loss of business, loss of data, or loss of goodwill, arising out of or related to the Services, even if AxoSoul has been advised of the possibility of such damages.
AxoSoul shall not be liable for any delay, failure, or error caused by the Client's failure to provide required materials, approvals, or information on time.
AxoSoul is not liable for the failure or downtime of third-party services, APIs, cloud platforms, or infrastructure providers used in or integrated into Deliverables.
12. Termination
12.1 Termination by Client

The Client may terminate a project engagement at any time by providing written notice to AxoSoul at hello@axosoul.in. Upon termination, the Client shall pay for all work completed up to the date of termination, as calculated by AxoSoul based on the milestone schedule and the proportion of work completed within the current milestone. Completed and delivered milestones are non-refundable.
12.2 Termination by AxoSoul

AxoSoul may terminate a project engagement immediately upon written notice if: the Client fails to make payment by the due date and does not remedy the breach within 14 days of notice; the Client materially breaches any provision of these Terms; the Client engages in abusive, threatening, or fraudulent conduct towards AxoSoul staff; or the project involves any illegal, unethical, or harmful activity. In such cases, AxoSoul retains all payments received for work completed and delivered.
12.3 Effect of Termination

Upon termination, both parties will cease all active work on the project. AxoSoul will deliver to the Client all completed Deliverables for which full payment has been received. Incomplete work will be delivered at AxoSoul's discretion. IP ownership transfers only to the extent that full milestone payments have been received for the corresponding Deliverables.
13. Post-Delivery Maintenance and Support
Every project includes a complimentary 6-month technical maintenance period commencing from the date of project delivery and launch. During this period, AxoSoul will provide:
Bug fixes for issues arising from AxoSoul's code that were not present at the time of delivery.
Minor dependency and package updates to address security vulnerabilities.
Minor content or configuration changes as reasonably requested by the Client.
Basic performance monitoring and reporting.

The maintenance period does not include: new features or functionality; redesign or major UI changes; issues caused by Client-made modifications; changes caused by third-party platform updates or API deprecations unless AxoSoul is contracted to address them; or hosting, domain, or infrastructure management unless separately agreed.
After the 6-month complimentary maintenance period, ongoing support and maintenance services may be arranged on a retained or ad hoc basis at separately quoted rates.
14. Communication Standards and Project Management

AxoSoul is committed to direct, real-time communication with active project clients. During active development, a dedicated Slack or WhatsApp channel will be established for the project team and the Client's designated contact. Daily progress updates will be provided. AxoSoul's response time commitment is fewer than 4 hours during business hours (Monday–Saturday, 9AM–8PM IST) and fewer than 30 minutes for critical production issues. For international clients, timezone flexibility will be accommodated as agreed during the discovery phase.
15. Prohibited Uses of AxoSoul's Website and Services
You agree not to use AxoSoul's website or services to:
Develop, market, or distribute any product or service that is illegal, harmful, fraudulent, harassing, defamatory, or otherwise objectionable under applicable law.
Infringe upon the intellectual property rights, privacy rights, or other rights of any third party.
Develop platforms facilitating illegal gambling, pyramid schemes, phishing, malware distribution, or unauthorized data collection.
Attempt to gain unauthorized access to AxoSoul's systems, databases, or infrastructure.
Submit false, misleading, or fraudulent information in the course of engaging AxoSoul's services.
Reverse-engineer, decompile, or attempt to extract AxoSoul's proprietary tools, methodologies, or internal processes.
Resell or sublicense AxoSoul's services without prior written consent.
16. Governing Law and Jurisdiction

These Terms and Conditions, and any project agreements made pursuant to them, shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of India, including but not limited to the Indian Contract Act, 1872; the Information Technology Act, 2000; the Information Technology (Amendment) Act, 2008; and the Copyright Act, 1957.

For domestic (Indian) clients, any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts located in Tenkasi, Tamil Nadu, India. For international clients, AxoSoul and the Client may agree in writing to an alternative jurisdiction or arbitration mechanism. Notwithstanding the above, AxoSoul reserves the right to seek injunctive or equitable relief in any court of competent jurisdiction to protect its intellectual property rights.
17. Dispute Resolution

In the event of any dispute, claim, or controversy arising out of or relating to these Terms or any project engagement, the parties agree to first attempt to resolve the matter through good-faith negotiation. Either party may initiate this process by sending written notice to the other party describing the nature of the dispute.

If the dispute is not resolved through negotiation within 30 days of the written notice, either party may escalate the matter to formal mediation. If mediation does not resolve the dispute within 60 days, the parties may proceed to litigation in the competent courts as specified in Section 16. For international clients, the parties may mutually agree to binding arbitration under the rules of an internationally recognized arbitration body.
18. Force Majeure

Neither party shall be held liable for any failure or delay in performance of its obligations under these Terms due to causes beyond its reasonable control, including but not limited to acts of God, natural disasters, pandemic, government action, war, strikes, civil unrest, critical infrastructure failures, or cyberattacks. The affected party shall notify the other party in writing as soon as reasonably practicable upon becoming aware of such circumstances. If the force majeure event persists for more than 60 days, either party may terminate the affected project engagement upon written notice, with payment due only for work completed.
19. Modifications to These Terms

AxoSoul reserves the right to update, modify, or replace these Terms and Conditions at any time at its sole discretion. Updated Terms will be posted on the AxoSoul website with a revised "Last Updated" date. For existing project engagements, material changes to these Terms will be communicated to the Client by email at least 14 days before taking effect. Your continued use of AxoSoul's website or services after any updates to these Terms constitutes your acceptance of the revised Terms.
20. Entire Agreement and Severability

These Terms and Conditions, together with any project-specific Statement of Work, proposal, or contract, constitute the entire agreement between the parties with respect to the subject matter hereof, and supersede all prior agreements, understandings, representations, and negotiations. If any provision of these Terms is found by a court of competent jurisdiction to be invalid, illegal, or unenforceable, that provision shall be severed from these Terms, and the remaining provisions shall continue in full force and effect. Any waiver of a breach of these Terms by either party shall not constitute a waiver of any subsequent breach.
21. Contact Information
For any questions, concerns, or legal notices regarding these Terms and Conditions, please contact AxoSoul at:
AxoSoul
Tenkasi, Tamil Nadu, India
Email: hello@axosoul.in
Phone/WhatsApp: +91 8610381533
Website: www.axosoul.in
Business Hours: Monday – Saturday, 9:00 AM – 8:00 PM IST
AxoSoul operates globally and serves international clients across multiple time zones. International clients may contact us via email or WhatsApp for timezone-flexible support.
© 2025–2026 AXOSOUL. ALL RIGHTS RESERVED.
Designed & Built with ❤️ and 10,000+ Hours of Craftsmanship.
